backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage and email subscription features, with role-based access control (admin/user) enforced via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the CETA-2.png logo asset was saved and its references updated in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of brief one-sentence descriptions for each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust (CGCT) HOPE Vision 2036' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in LanguageProvider and composes all page sections (Navigation, Hero, About, VisionPillars, Reunion, Survey, StakeholderVoices, DigitalImpact, Footer) in order.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying a timeline of organizational milestones (2010–2026) with icons and a chairman profile card, with scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/DigitalImpactSec: Section showcasing four digital transformation initiatives (Newsletter, Brand Ambassadors, School Liaison Network, WhatsApp/Email Strategy) as animated icon cards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer with a CTA banner, action buttons, dual logos, contact info, social media links, a newsletter subscription form wired to the backend, and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated countdown timer, count-up stat cards (years, alumni, districts, batches), logos, headline, and a scroll-to-survey CTA button.
frontend/src/components/LeafMotif.tsx: Decorative background component that renders up to 5 rotated diamond/leaf shapes at fixed positions using configurable color and opacity.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, dual logos, a centered title, and a language toggle button; collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile.
frontend/src/components/ReunionSection.t: Section detailing the first HOPE Alumni Reunion event (April 2026, KILA Thrissur) with a poster image, event details card, purpose list, and participant category breakdown.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderVoice: Section displaying six stakeholder insight cards from February 2026 meetings, each with an icon, title, and description, plus meeting badge indicators.
frontend/src/components/SurveySection.ts: Survey participation section providing links to English and Malayalam Microsoft Forms surveys for the CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 initiative, with a confidentiality badge.
frontend/src/components/VisionPillarsSec: React component that renders the Vision 2036 Strategic Pillars section with four animated cards (Quality of Output, Organizational Restructuring, Sustainability, Education) using intersection observer for scroll animations and i18n via LanguageContext.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for bilingual (English/Malayalam) support, exposing a translation function `t`, the current language, and a toggle function backed by a static translations record.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and an optional admin token, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdown.ts: Custom hook that computes and updates a live countdown (days, hours, minutes, seconds) to a fixed target date of April 12, 2026 at 9:00 AM IST, updating every second.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a numeric counter from 0 to a target value over a given duration using requestAnimationFrame with an ease-out cubic curve, triggered by a boolean flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, providing a React context and provider with login, logout, and identity state management including delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a boolean `isVisible` flag once a referenced element enters the viewport, disconnecting the observer after the first trigger.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitSubscription` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitSubscription` method with an email address using React Query's `useMutation`.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the CGCT design system with CSS custom properties for brand colors (maroon, gold, sage), Tailwind base/utilities layers, typography, and reusable utility classes for animations, gradients, and card effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the CETA Galaxy website, extending the default theme with custom brand colors (maroon, gold, sage, cream), typography/font families, shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust website, recording the current version, architectural notes about the CETA-2.png logo asset, existing features, and fix-request status.
